items.headline_en: LangGraph release feed now shows langgraph==1.2.0a1
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for LangGraph changed and the newest visible tag is langgraph==1.2.0a1. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-29T22:30:21Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
items.evidence_excerpt: title=langgraph==1.2.0a1 updated=2026-04-29T22:30:21Z link=https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph/releases/tag/1.2.0a1 summary= content=Changes since 1.1.10 feat: allow graph to graceful shutdown/drain by request ( #7274 ) release: alpha for timers ( #7647 ) feat(langgraph): DeltaChannel : store sentinel in blobs, reconstruct from checkpoint_writes ( #7586 ) chore: dynamic push-task timeouts ( #7646 ) chore: update x links to langchain_oss ( #7645 ) chore: idle timeout ( #7631 ) feat(langgraph): native v2 projections for custom, updates, checkpoints, debug, tasks ( #7640 ) fix(langgraph): decouple run.output/interrupted/interrupts from ValuesTransformer ( #7639 ) refactor(langgraph,prebuilt): merge EventLog into StreamChannel with optional name ( #7637 ) feat(langgraph): add streamin...
diff_excerpt: +content=Changes since 1.1.10 feat: allow graph to graceful shutdown/drain by request ( #7274 ) release: alpha for timers ( #7647 ) feat(langgraph): DeltaChannel : store sentinel in blobs, reconstruct from checkpoint_writes ( #7586 ) chore: dynamic push-task timeouts ( #7646 ) chore: update x links to langchain_oss ( #7645 ) chore: idle timeout ( #7631 ) feat(langgraph): native v2 projections for custom, updates, checkpoints, debug, tasks ( #7640 ) fix(langgraph): decouple run.output/interrupted/interrupts from ValuesTransformer ( #7639 ) refactor(langgraph,prebuilt): merge EventLog into StreamChannel with optional name ( #7637 ) feat(langgraph): add streaming transformer infrastructure and tests ( #7519 ) chore(deps): bump the minor-and-patch group across 1 directory with 4 updates (ty held back) ( #7635 )

+content=Changes since checkpoint==4.0.3 release: alpha for timers ( #7647 ) feat(langgraph): DeltaChannel : store sentinel in blobs, reconstruct from checkpoint_writes ( #7586 ) chore: dynamic push-task timeouts ( #7646 ) chore: update x links to langchain_oss ( #7645 )

content=Changes since 1.1.7a2 release(langgraph): 1.1.7 ( #7540 ) fix: time travel when going back to interrupt node ( #7498 ) chore(deps): bump langsmith from 0.6.4 to 0.7.31 in /libs/langgraph ( #7526 ) release(checkpoint): 4.0.2 ( #7518 )

-content=Changes since prebuilt==1.0.9 release(prebuilt): 1.0.10 ( #7541 ) release(langgraph): 1.1.7 ( #7540 ) fix(prebuilt): handle injected NotRequired keys ( #7392 ) chore(deps): bump langsmith from 0.6.4 to 0.7.31 in /libs/prebuilt ( #7530 ) release(checkpoint): 4.0.2 ( #7518 ) chore(deps): bump pytest from 9.0.2 to 9.0.3 in /libs/prebuilt ( #7505 ) release(langgraph): 1.1.7a2 ( #7511 ) chore: allow passing some metadata only for tracing purposes ( #7383 ) release(langgraph): 1.1.7a1 ( #7476 ) chore(deps-dev): bump the minor-and-patch group in /libs/prebuilt with 3 updates ( #7376 ) release: langgraph 1.1.6 ( #7407 )
